dependencies: Dependence on various components, compounds, raw materials, and energy (including oil and natural gas and their derivatives) supplied by others
Some suppliers are limited- or sole-source suppliers
Supply chain disruptions impacting distribution of products
Disruption to key manufacturing sites' operations due to natural disasters, government actions, strikes or labor disruptions
risks: Climate impacts and severe weather events
Government actions relating to discharge or emission permits
Sustained interruption in receipt of adequate supplies
Inability to source adequate alternatives in a cost-effective manner
Fluctuations in costs and availability of purchased components, compounds, raw materials, energy, and labor

regulatory_risks: PFAS regulations in United States, Europe and internationally
EPA drinking water standards for PFAS (PFOA, PFOS, PFHxS, PFNA, HFPO-DA)
CERCLA designation of PFOA and PFOS as hazardous substances
EU REACH restrictions on PFAS manufacturing and use
EU POPs Regulation listing PFOA, PFOS, PFHxS
EU Food Contaminants Regulation on PFAS in foodstuff
EU Drinking Water Directive limits on PFAS
State-level PFAS regulations (Maine, Minnesota, California, etc.)
Clean Water Act NPDES permit requirements for PFAS
Toxic Substances Control Act (TSCA) reporting and restrictions
Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) hazardous waste regulations
Clean Air Act hazardous air pollutant listings
Environmental remediation obligations under CERCLA and state laws
Compliance with False Claims Act, anti-kickback laws, Sunshine Act
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and anti-bribery laws
International import and export requirements and trade sanctions compliance
Antitrust and competition laws
Securities and corporate governance regulations
Product liability regulations
Intellectual property laws
Tax laws and regulations (including BEPS, GILTI, FDII)
Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) requirements
Data privacy and cybersecurity regulations (including EU regulations)
Artificial intelligence regulatory developments
Climate change and environmental regulations
Trade restrictions such as tariffs and retaliatory measures

sanction_risks: US-China trade tensions and potential tariffs
Trade restrictions and retaliatory counter measures
Iran sanctions (payments to Iran Intellectual Property Office through Bank Melli)
Financial and economic sanctions on certain industry sectors and parties in conflict zones
